items.title: ‘Wuthering Heights’ Rotten Tomatoes Audience Score Slips Past ‘Barbie’
items.description: Rotten Tomatoes audiences scores for Wuthering Heights are in, and they are high that both critics and even Barbie.

items.title: Nothing Opens First India Flagship: Why 2,000 Fans Just Mobbed ‘Rebellious’ New Store
items.description: Nothing today opened its first store in India, with a space-age look and 2,000 people in line to experience what it calls a participatory space.

items.title: Even Elon Musk Is Playing ‘ARC Raiders’
items.description: The world's richest man, Elon Musk, has said that he's playing ARC Raiders in his free time, his latest gaming endeavor.

items.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Sunday, February 15
items.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

items.title: A Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms’ Egg Has Spoiled A Huge Dunk Revelation
items.description: A Knight Of The Seven Kingdom’s Egg has gone off script, talking about a potentially big season 2 spoiler, and confirming a huge Thrones fan theory.
